items.name: anvil
items.description: Anvil is a high-performance machine learning framework written in Rust, designed from the ground up for speed, parallelism, and control.

items.name: Orchestration_Engine
items.description: ML Pipeline Orchestrator — Framework Python modulaire pour automatiser le cycle de vie complet d'un projet Machine Learning : ingestion de données, preprocessing, entraînement concurrent, et déploiement via FastAPI. Conçu autour de classes abstraites (ABC), de décorateurs de tracking d'état et d'une architecture extensible pensée pour le travail

items.name: Diabetes-Complication-Risk-Prediction-Model
items.description: A machine learning project that predicts diabetes-related complications such as cardiovascular disease, kidney disease, and neuropathy using patient clinical data. The project includes data cleaning, preprocessing, feature engineering, exploratory data analysis, and a multi-label classification framework.

It uses ensemble models (Random Forest, SVM, XGBoost) to identify malicious activities and detect zero-day attacks. The system provides accurate and efficient threat detection through pattern-based learning.

items.name: fairness_ontology
items.description: A comprehensive and extensible ontology for systematically modeling fairness notions, metrics, biases, evaluation methods, and scientific provenance in machine learning. This ontology provides researchers, developers, and practitioners with a unified, machine-readable framework to guide the design and assessment of fair ML systems.

It is designed to all-in-one automated handles everything from initial web reconnaissance to vulnerability detection. A unique aspect of this framework is its integration of Machine Learning to intelligently predict vulnerabilities based on reconnaissance data.
